WhyMe.subtitle: Meet Your Advisor
WhyMe.desc: After 5+ years in international corporate finance, I transitioned to protect what matters most — the financial future of real people. I understand Germany's complexity, especially for expats navigating GKV, PKV, and pension gaps.
WhyMe.benefit1: Corporate Finance background — true expertise, not just a salesman
WhyMe.benefit2: Consultations in 4 languages: English, German, French & Arabic
WhyMe.benefit4: Tailored ERGO solutions built around your unique life situation

CookieConsent.msg: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze our traffic. No personal data is stored without your consent.

ProductCards.subtitle: What We Cover
ProductCards.title: Comprehensive Protection
ProductCards.desc: Custom ERGO portfolios tailored precisely to your situation — from wealth protection to premium healthcare access.
ProductCards.p1Desc: Secure your living standards in retirement with guaranteed ERGO plans.
ProductCards.p2Desc: Irreplaceable financial protection and peace of mind for your loved ones.
ProductCards.p3Desc: Radiant smiles without the exorbitant dental bills and waiting times.
ProductCards.p4Desc: Worldwide top-tier 24/7 protection wherever life takes you.
ProductCards.p5Desc: Safeguard your rights effortlessly and confidently in all disputes.
ProductCards.p6Desc: Premium complete private healthcare with specialist access tailored for you.

ProductPage.ctaDesc: Book your 100% free initial consultation now. Online, in-person in Berlin, or via phone.
